headline: 3 Reasons Retirees Should Reconsider Enrolling in a Standalone Medicare Drug Plan in 2026
summary: You turn 65, sign up for Medicare, and a wall of mail arrives pushing standalone Part D drug plans. The default move for decades has been to pick one and forget it. For 2026, that default deserves a fresh look. The Inflation Reduction Act fully kicks in this year, premiums and surcharges shift, and bundled ... 3 Reasons Retirees Should Reconsider Enrolling in a Standalone Medicare Drug Plan in 2026

headline: Costco Discrimination Verdict Puts Legal And Compliance Risks In Focus
summary: A federal jury in California rules against Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) in a disability discrimination lawsuit involving a former employee. The jury awards US$200,000 in damages, with Costco also facing potential additional exposure from attorneys' fees. The case centers on Costco's handling of a workplace accommodation request and management's response to the employee's needs. Costco Wholesale, traded as NasdaqGS:COST, operates membership based warehouse clubs that focus on bulk goods,...

headline: Stocks Set to Open Higher as U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes Hold, PCE Inflation Data and Fed Speak Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.67%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.03% this morning as investors remained hopeful that the latest U.S. strikes on Iran would not derail talks to end the Middle East conflict.
